name: Pickled Pink Egg Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1 Use about 2 tablespoons of the juice from pickled beets if desired; gives a pink color and adds a pleasant taste.
2 Simmer vinegar and spices uncovered for 10 minutes. Cool slightly, add garlic and bay leaf.
3 Pack eggs into a screw top jar, add vinegar mixture; cover and cool to room temperature.
4 Refrigerate 7-10 days before serving, longer for stronger flavor.
